decisions.rationale: Self-contained question about how long an SMS OTP takes to arrive in the inbox for Postal Vote BD.
Directly asks the approximate waiting time to receive an OTP in the postal voting system.
Clearly asks whether receiving the OTP in the Postal Vote app can take a few minutes, matching OTP delivery-time intent.
Direct clean example asking how long OTP arrival takes in the Postal Vote BD app.
Asks the usual wait time to get an OTP in the Postal Vote BD app; self-contained and on tag.
Asks the estimated time to receive the OTP for the Election Commission postal vote app.
Intent is clear: asks the usual time needed to receive an OTP for the EC postal vote service.
Clearly asks how long to wait for a Postal Vote BD OTP to arrive.
Asks the usual time for an OTP to arrive in the inbox for the Election Commission postal vote app.
Self-contained question about how many minutes a Postal Vote BD OTP usually takes to arrive.
Asks how long a verification OTP takes to arrive in the inbox for Postal Vote BD.
Security code arrival time for the Postal Vote app fits the OTP/confirmation code delivery-time tag.
Directly asks how many minutes it usually takes to receive OTP from the Postal Vote BD app.
Verification code sent for postal vote and its average arrival time clearly matches the tag.
Asks the average arrival time of an OTP in the postal vote system; clean and self-contained.
Despite slightly wordy phrasing, it clearly asks how long a confirmation code takes to arrive in the inbox.
Asks how long it takes to receive an OTP sent from the EC postal voting app.
Asks the time required for a verification code to arrive from the EC Postal Vote BD app.
Security code arrival wait time for the Postal Vote BD app is directly within this tag.
Asks how long a generated code takes to reach the phone in the Postal Vote app, matching code delivery time.
Asks whether receiving the code in the Postal Vote BD app requires a 2–3 minute wait.
Asks how long to wait to get a security code in the postal voting app; clear tag fit.
One-time code delivery time for the postal voting app is effectively OTP delivery time.
Asks the estimated code delivery time in the EC postal vote app, which matches OTP/security-code timing.

result.packet_rationale: All rows are self-contained questions about how long an OTP, security code, verification code, confirmation code, or one-time code takes to arrive or be received for the Postal Vote BD/app/service. None involve password reset/update timing, non-time intents, or require prior context.
